div.h2: Shell Abstract Syntax Tree: Physical Layout and Union Variants

ul.li: Base Alignment: 8-byte (Required by 64-bit pointers in union).
Pre-fetching: Sequential AST traversal minimizes cache misses.

div.p: The internal union is limited to 24 bytes. Variants exceeding this must use an external heap allocation referenced via a pointer (8B) to maintain the 32-byte node footprint.
